item.title: No clear path to ending the partial government shutdown as lawmakers dig in over DHS oversight
item.description: Lawmakers and the White House offered no signs of compromise Sunday in their battle over oversight of federal immigration officers that has led to a p...

item.title: Cornyn opponent Paxton says Washington Republicans wasting time, money trying to rescue incumbent
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton says Washington Republicans are wasting their time and resources trying to throw Sen. John Cornyn a lifeline in the ...

item.title: Trump's border czar says 'small' security force will remain in Minnesota after enforcement drawdown
item.description: White House border czar Tom Homan said Sunday that more than 1,000 immigration agents have left Minnesota's Twin Cities area and hundreds more will de...

item.title: Teen daughter of a Chicago man detained in an immigration case dies from a rare cancer
item.description: A Chicago teen who spoke out for her father's release after he was detained last fall by immigration officials in a deportation case has died after ba...

item.title: Massie says Trump wants him out for targeting the 'Epstein class'
item.description: Rep. Thomas Massie says President Trump wants him pushed out of Congress because he's trying to expose what he calls the "Epstein class."
